name: quantio

metadata.name: quantio
metadata.summary: Type hinting and safe unit conversion for physical quantities in Python.

documentation:
# quantio
Type hinting and safe unit conversion for physical quantities in Python.

classes.name: quantio.exceptions.CanNotAddTypesError
documentation: Raised when two uncompatible quantities are added to one another.

classes.name: quantio.exceptions.CanNotSubtractTypesError
documentation: Raised when two uncompatible quantities are subtracted from one another.

classes.name: quantio.exceptions.NoUnitSpecifiedError
documentation: Raised when a Vector[_QuantityBase] is converted to a np.array without specifying a unit.

modules.name: quantio
documentation: The main quantio package.

classes.name: quantio.quantities.Quantity

methods.name: quantio.quantities.Quantity.__eq__
documentation: Assess if this object is the same as another.

methods.name: quantio.quantities.Quantity.__add__
documentation: Add two quantities of the same type.

methods.name: quantio.quantities.Quantity.__sub__
documentation: Subtract two quantities of the same type.

methods.name: quantio.quantities.Quantity.__repr__
documentation: Return an unambiguous representation of this quantity.
Parent class to all quantities.

documentation: Return evenly spaced values within a given interval.

documentation: Construct a Vector by repeating an element a certain number of times.

documentation: Convert this vector into a numpy array of floats.

documentation: Return a sum of all elements of this array.

methods.name: quantio.vector.Vector.__class_getitem__
documentation: Return this class for type hinting.

methods.name: quantio.vector.Vector.__getitem__
documentation: Return the element at a specific index.

methods.name: quantio.vector.Vector.__setitem__
documentation: Set the element at a specific index.

methods.name: quantio.vector.Vector.__add__
documentation: Add another vector to this one.

methods.name: quantio.vector.Vector.__sub__
documentation: Subtract another vector from this one.

methods.name: quantio.vector.Vector.__mul__
documentation: Multipy this vector with either another vector or a scalar.

methods.name: quantio.vector.Vector.__truediv__
documentation: Multipy this vector with either another vector or a scalar.

methods.name: quantio.vector.Vector.__eq__
documentation: Assess if this object is the same as another.

documentation: Return the number of elements in this vector.

methods.name: quantio.vector.Vector.__str__
documentation: Display this vector as a string for printing.

methods.name: quantio.vector.Vector.__repr__
documentation: Return an unambiguous representation of this vector.
A 1 dimensional array of either quantity or numeric elements.
